title: A New Mineral Found on Mars
summary: Scientists have found a new mineral on Mars that might be brand-new. It is called iron sulfate and was discovered near a big canyon called Valles Marineris. Mars is very dry, so minerals like this can stay for billions of years and tell us about the planet's past. Researchers used data from spacecraft to study the mineral. They think it formed when water evaporated and left behind layers. Heat from volcanoes or lava might have changed the mineral later. This discovery helps us learn more about Mars' history and if it had water long ago.

keywords.explanation: a natural solid found in rocks
the red planet in our solar system
a type of mineral made from iron and sulfur
a liquid that can help form minerals

Where on Mars was the mineral discovered?
Why can minerals last a long time on Mars?
What might have changed the mineral after it formed?
What does the mineral tell us about Mars' past?
How did scientists study the mineral?

background_read: Mars is a planet in our solar system known as the Red Planet. It is very dry and cold, with canyons and rocks. Scientists send robots and spacecraft to explore Mars and learn about its history. Minerals are natural materials found in rocks that can tell stories about how a planet formed and if it had water or life long ago. This discovery helps us understand if Mars was once wetter and more like Earth.
Article_Structure: WHO: Scientists led by Dr. Janice Bishop
WHAT: Found a new iron sulfate mineral on Mars
WHERE: Near Valles Marineris canyon on Mars
WHY: To learn about Mars' past environment and water history

perspectives.description: Finding new minerals helps us understand Mars better
